answers: Solar energy is power generated from sunlight using photovoltaic panels or solar thermal systems. It's clean, renewable, and becoming increasingly affordable worldwide.

Solar panels work by converting sunlight into electricity using photovoltaic cells. When light hits the cells, it creates an electric current. This electricity can power your home or be stored in batteries.
